blurb: Onward is a UK centre-right think-tank focused on economic opportunity, national resilience and communities; AI/tech is an occasional theme rather than a core specialism.

publications.title: The Generative AI Revolution: opportunities, shocks, and risks
publications.summary: An Onward report mapping the opportunities, economic shocks and risks of generative AI for the UK and arguing for a proactive policy response.

news.title: The UK needs to build a British data library to become an AI leader
news.summary: Onward press item arguing the UK should build a national 'British data library' to compete in AI.

news.title: Think tank calls for 'Great British GPT' to keep UK ahead in AI race
news.summary: Onward press item proposing a sovereign 'Great British GPT' large language model to keep the UK competitive in AI.

notes: Harvested from ukonward.com sitemaps (200 OK, browser UA). The site RSS feed (ukonward.com/feed/) returned no items. Sitemap lastmod values are a bulk migration timestamp (2025-06-11) and unreliable; fetched individual pages and used each page's JSON-LD datePublished as the true date. Onward is a general centre-right think-tank, not an AI specialist — only a small, older set of genuinely AI-focused items exists (2023-2024). No author bylines were exposed in page JSON-LD. No controversies where Onward is a named legal/regulatory party. Most-recent reports (Building Consent 2026-03, Question of Degree 2026-05) are non-AI and excluded.
